step_rationale: VE-cadherin maintains endothelial barrier integrity; degradation is hallmark of endothelial erosion and leukocyte transmigration.
mechanism: Vascular endothelial cadherin cleavage destabilizes endothelial junctions, enabling transmigration and exposing subendothelial matrix.
